title: The Go Programming Language
description: A comprehensive introduction to Go, covering its type system, concurrency model, and standard library.

title: Go in Practice
description: Seventy techniques for building real-world Go applications, from web services to concurrency patterns.

title: Designing Data-Intensive Applications
description: The big ideas behind reliable, scalable, and maintainable systems built around data storage and processing.

title: The Fifth Season
description: In a world of recurring catastrophes a woman searches for her abducted daughter.

title: Dune
description: On the desert planet Arrakis a noble family fights for control of the spice melange.

title: Project Hail Mary
description: A lone astronaut wakes with amnesia aboard a spacecraft and must save humanity from extinction.

title: The Three-Body Problem
description: A secret military project makes contact with an alien civilization on the brink of destruction.

title: A Memory Called Empire
description: An ambassador to a vast empire must solve her predecessor's murder while hiding a forbidden technology.

title: Children of Time
description: The last remnants of humanity contend with a terraformed world inherited by uplifted spiders.

title: Hyperion
description: Seven pilgrims journey to the Time Tombs of Hyperion, each carrying a tale that explains their fate.

title: A Fire Upon the Deep
description: An ancient malevolent power is unleashed across the galaxy as survivors flee toward a distant world.

title: The Pragmatic Programmer
description: Pragmatic advice on the craft of software development, from coding habits to career-long learning.

title: Database Internals
description: A deep dive into how distributed data systems work, covering storage engines and replication.

title: System Design Interview
description: An insider's guide to scalable system design with step-by-step frameworks for common problems.

title: Site Reliability Engineering
description: How Google runs production systems at scale, covering SLOs, on-call practice, and automation.

title: Go in Action
description: An introduction to Go for developers, emphasizing idiomatic concurrency and the standard library.

title: The Deep Sky
description: The crew of an aging tunneling ship navigates life, work, and identity across the galaxy.

title: Ancillary Justice
description: The fragmented remnant of a warship's AI seeks revenge in a vast interstellar empire.

title: The Left Hand of Darkness
description: An envoy navigates the ambisexual society of an icebound planet.

title: Foundation
description: A mathematician predicts the fall of a galactic empire and plans to shorten the dark age.

title: The Dark Forest
subjects: science fiction;first contact;strategy;remembrance of earth's past
description: Humanity races to prepare a defense against an alien fleet that will arrive in four centuries.

title: Children of Ruin
description: A second uplift experiment goes awry on a distant ocean world, forcing strange alliances.
